title: Dumplings Delight Reload
description: Players can make all kinds of dumpling food in this mod!
body:
More dumplings for Farmer's Delight.

This is a port of the Dumplings Delight Mod from the 1.16.5 Forge version to the 1.20.1 Forge version.
Players can make all kinds of dumpling food in this mod!

This mod is forked from the following project for modification
[Dumplings Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/dumplings-delight)
1.16.5 Forge

In this mod, you may encounter many food synthesis issues with other mods. You can use [[OEI] One Enough Item](https://modrinth.com/mod/one-enough-item) to unify them
